zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Trussell於大約1261年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親Sir William de Trussell I37歲，母親Roesia Pantulf35歲。他於1304年與Matilda Mainwaring在英國英格蘭越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1307年被列為lord of cubleston and of warmincham。他去世於大約1338年在英國斯塔福爾馬爾斯頓享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Trussell于大约1261年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，他的父亲Sir William de Trussell I37岁，母亲Roesia Pantulf35岁。他于1304年与Matilda Mainwaring在英国英格兰越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1307年被列为lord of cubleston and of warmincham。他去世于大约1338年在英国斯塔福爾馬爾斯頓享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Trussell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Middle English trus(s)el(le) ‘bundle, parcel’ (Old French troussel), perhaps for a porter (see Truss ), or from the same word in the sense ‘stamp, mould (for stamping coins)’, for someone who minted coins.
variant of Thrussell, a nickname from Middle English thros(t)el, thrus(t)el ‘song thrush’ (Old English thros(t)le). Compare Thrush .

variants.name: Truss
meanings: English (mainly Essex and Middlesex): metonymic occupational name from Middle English trusse ‘bundle, package’ (Old French trousse), perhaps for a porter. See also Trussell .
Americanized form of Ukrainian Trus: nickname from trus ‘rabbit’, typically applied to someone thought to be a coward.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Trussell was born about 1261, in Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir William de Trussell I, was 37 and his mother, Roesia Pantulf, was 35. He married Matilda Mainwaring in 1304, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. In 1307, at the age of 47, his occupation is listed as lord of cubleston and of warmincham. He died about 1338, in Marston, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Trussell est né environ 1261, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Trussell I, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Roesia Pantulf, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Mainwaring en 1304, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. En 1307, à l’âge de 47 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord of cubleston and of warmincham. Il est décédé environ 1338, à Marston, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Trussell um 1261 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Trussell I 37 und seine Mutter Roesia Pantulf 35. Er hat 1304 in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Matilda Mainwaring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1307, als er 47 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord of cubleston and of warmincham aufgeführt. Er starb um 1338 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Marston, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William De Trussell è nato il circa 1261 nel Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Trussell I, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Roesia Pantulf, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Mainwaring nel 1304, nel York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1307, all'età di 47 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord of cubleston and of warmincham. Morì circa 1338, nel Marston, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Trussellが約1261年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William de Trussell Iは37歳，母Roesia Pantulfは35歳であった。1304年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでMatilda Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1307年，47歳の時，職業はlord of cubleston and of warminchamと記録されている。彼は約1338年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアマーストンで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Trussell(이)가 대략 1261년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Trussell I(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Roesia Pantulf(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1304년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 Matilda Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1307년, 47세의 나이로 그의 직업은 lord of cubleston and of warmincham이었다. 그는 대략 1338년 영국 스태퍼드실르 마스턴에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Trussell nasceu aproximadamente 1261, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Trussell I, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Roesia Pantulf, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Mainwaring em 1304, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1307, com 47 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord of cubleston and of warmincham. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1338, em Marston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Trussell родился около 1261 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Trussell I было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Roesia Pantulf, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Mainwaring в 1304 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1307 году, в возрасте 47 лет,  он работал по профессии lord of cubleston and of warmincham. Он умер около 1338 г. в местности марстон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

sm.about 1261–about 1338: e tusa o le 1261–e tusa o le 1338

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William De Trussell nació aproximadamente 1261, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Trussell I, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Roesia Pantulf, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Matilda Mainwaring en 1304, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1307, a la edad de 47 años, su ocupación registrada era lord of cubleston and of warmincham. Murió aproximadamente 1338, en Marston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
